observation.summary: repo-wide docs coverage can pass while executable .riido.json manifest distribution remains invisible in the coverage artifact

hypothesis.summary: the repo-wide coverage manifest should publish both its evidence loop and bounded manifest inventory samples as machine-readable CI evidence

execution.summary: require repo-wide knowledge coverage manifests to carry a complete loop and render manifest inventory groups plus samples into generated reader output

evaluation.summary: coverage check must pass while reporting generated/direct/manual counts, the complete evidence loop, and bounded manifest inventory samples

retrospective.summary: coverage gates now describe their own loop and executable manifest distribution in public CI artifacts, reducing review-time interpretation variance

evidence.proves: repo-wide docs are generated, direct-SSOT backed, or registered as manual debt, and the coverage manifest exposes a complete evidence loop plus manifest inventory samples
public CI uploads repo-wide executable knowledge coverage evidence
